meta.title: doctore.ar - Transforming Your Medical Practice
meta.description: Comprehensive platform for medical practice management. Appointments, billing, referral network and consulting for healthcare professionals.

hero.badge: A new era for your practice
hero.title: Your medical practice deserves better
hero.subtitle: We know how hard it is to balance patient care with administrative management. It's time to change that.

problem.title: The challenges you face daily
problem.subtitle: As a healthcare professional, your time is valuable. However, much of your day is lost to tasks that take you away from what really matters.
problem.card1_text: Missed calls, last-minute cancellations, and a schedule that seems uncontrollable.
problem.card2_text: Insurance companies, taxes, withholdings. Accounting consumes valuable hours of your week.
problem.card3_text: You need to refer patients but don't know trusted specialists in other areas.
problem.card4_text: Making business decisions without data or professional advice can be overwhelming.
problem.card5_text: Multiple tools that don't communicate with each other, generating duplicate work.
problem.card6_text: You want to grow but don't know where to start or what strategies to implement.

solution.title: Because we understand your challenges
solution.text: We are a team that has worked side by side with healthcare professionals. We know the headaches of medical management because we have lived them with you.
solution.item1: Designed by and for healthcare professionals
solution.item3: Human support that understands your reality
solution.item4: Constant evolution based on your feedback

turnosmedicos.title: Meet TurnosMedicos
turnosmedicos.subtitle: The appointment management system that transforms the way you handle your schedule. Simple, intuitive, and designed so you can focus on your patients.
turnosmedicos.cta_note: Try free for 14 days, no credit card required

services.title: Your path to a successful practice
services.subtitle: Beyond appointments, we accompany you in every aspect of your professional growth.
services.step1_text: Connect with trusted specialists. Our verified network allows you to refer patients with peace of mind, knowing they will receive quality care.
services.step2_text: Let us handle the accounting. Our team knows the particularities of medical billing, insurance, and tax regimes in the healthcare sector.
services.step3_text: Because your practice is also a business. We help you make strategic decisions with data and experience to grow your practice.

transformation.title: The change you will experience
transformation.subtitle: See how your day-to-day can transform when you have the right tools.
transformation.before_item1: Hours lost on calls and confirmations

pricing.title: Plans designed for you
pricing.subtitle: No fine print, no surprises. Choose the plan that best fits your practice.
pricing.note: All prices in Argentine pesos. Tax included. Cancel anytime.

cta.title: Your success story starts today
cta.text: Join the hundreds of professionals who have already transformed their medical practice. The first step is the most important.

footer.tagline: We transform medical practice management with technology, community, and knowledge.
